admission_summary: Admitted for evidence-only readiness/decision reporting using CAP-0006. No context-pack integration, runtime context selection behavior, provider prompt changes, graph persistence, retrieval, embeddings, reranking, production index mutation, memory-store mutation, runtime-manifest mutation, or automatic context inclusion are admitted.
constraints: Proposal only: no implementation is admitted by this PLAN record.
No persisted graph node or edge writes.
No retrieval, embedding, reranking, or production index mutation.
Any context-pack integration must be proposed and admitted under a separate future plan.
next_action: Implement the admitted evidence-only readiness/decision report. The implementation may consume CAP-0006 reports and produce a bounded recommendation about whether to propose a separate integration plan, but it must not implement integration or runtime selection behavior.
objective: Use CAP-0006 evidence-only reports to decide whether a separate governed context-pack integration proposal is justified for graph-local scoped memory.
proposed_change: Add a deterministic repository evidence decision/report artifact around CAP-0006. The report should apply CAP-0006 to deterministic repository artifacts or fixtures, summarize whether relation paths, authority labels, token estimates, diagnostic rationales, and selection_effect none are adequate, and produce a bounded decision on whether to propose a separate context-pack integration plan.
rationale: GAP-0002 remains open after CAP-0005 and CAP-0006 because graph-local scoped memory selection is not implemented.
CAP-0006 provides evidence-only reports but does not itself decide whether integration should be proposed.
The current GAP-0002 recommended first slice asks for CAP-0006 evidence-only reports to decide whether a separate context-pack integration proposal should be created.
A decision/report artifact preserves the no-integration boundary while making the next governance choice auditable.
risk: A positive readiness decision may be mistaken for implementation approval. This plan must only decide whether to propose a separate integration plan; it must not admit or implement integration.
success_criteria: A deterministic decision/report contract is represented in tests and source code.
The report consumes CAP-0006 evidence-only output rather than bypassing it.
The report records whether relation paths, authority labels, token estimates, diagnostic rationales, and selection_effect none are adequate.
The report produces a bounded recommendation: propose a separate context-pack integration plan, or do not propose one yet.
The report explicitly preserves existing default context-pack behavior.
No runtime selection, provider prompt, graph persistence, retrieval, embedding, reranking, index, memory-store, runtime-manifest, or automatic-inclusion behavior is changed.
Self-model and audit tests remain green.
title: Decide graph neighborhood integration readiness
